steps.t: Egelferth suspects that Orc-killers have taken up holdings near the road west and can be flushed out into the open if provoked.

Egelferth suspects that Orc-killers have taken up holdings near the road west and can be flushed out into the open if provoked.
Egelferth can be found in northern Walstow. You should return to Egelferth with news of your success.
